allow: PowerShell($srcJar = "C:\\Users\\dael\\.gradle\\caches\\modules-2\\files-2.1\\com.badlogicgames.gdx\\gdx-backend-lwjgl3\\1.14.0\\25ee7eb0fb0bf8647f258e1500bf25ac02c5b37d\\gdx-backend-lwjgl3-1.14.0-sources.jar"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($srcJar\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq "Lwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration.java" }; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($entry.Open\(\)\); $content = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $content | Select-String -Pattern "\(?i\)\(hdpi|dpi|pixel|scale\)" | Select-Object -First 20)
